national_logistics_en: A total of 27 vehicles and 4 ambulances were deployed. UNICEF delivered motorcycles to multiple locations. Monitoring of construction works for Ebola Treatment Centres was conducted at three hospitals. The reception of 1,800 motorcycles from the Central Government began, designated for all pillar teams in Ituri.

national_logistics_en: Thirty motorcycles were received as logistical support from the central government for surveillance and coordination. Additionally, 162 blood bags were received for transfusion care to support continuity of essential health services.
summary_json: {"summary": " Thirty motorcycles were received as logistical support from the central government for surveillance and coordination . 162"}

national_logistics_en: Support was provided to all response pillars through vehicle fleet deployment. Motorcycle deliveries, supplied by UNICEF, continued to health zones.
summary_json: {"summary": " Motorcycle deliveries, supplied by UNICEF continued to health zones ."}
